title: Moving from item to another board and to a specific group on the other board
excerpt:
Hey everyone, 
I know how to move an item to another board but I want to move that item to a specific group on the other board. 
I can’t figure out how to do that.

posts.author: kacalica (Kyle)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone,

I know how to move an item to another board but I want to move that item to a specific group on the other board.
I can’t figure out how to do that.
